'''Melisma''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Ryn/Legends|Ryn]], and the sister of [[Droma]]. A refugee of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], she was evactuated from [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] to [[Gyndine/Legends|Gyndine]] to [[Ruan]]. Along with many other refugees, Melisma was later taken from Ruan to [[Fondor/Legends|Fondor]] by [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] hired by the [[Peace Brigade]]. The refugees were left abandoned on a derelict [[Space station/Legends|space station]] to be taken as [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]] by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] when the [[Extragalactic/Legends|extra-galactic]] invaders attacked the [[Star system/Legends|system]]. Melisma and the other refugees were eventually rescued from the station by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and Droma during the [[Battle of Fondor]].
